sections.paragraph:
verb לדמות (>>לִדְמוֹת)

to look alike, resemble, be similar to

verb להידמות

be like (someone else) ; to resemble; compare

verb הודמה

be simulated; compared to

verb דומה

be similar to, resemble; compared to

verb להדמות

to image; simulate; compare

verb לדמות (>>דימה)

to imagine, fancy; simulate; compare; plot

masculine noun

blood

masculine noun דמים

money; fee, price
